## Description
Brief description of what this PR does.

## Type of Change
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Documentation update
- [ ] Refactoring
- [ ] Performance improvement

## Related Issue
Closes #(issue number)

## Testing
- [ ] Ran `make test` — all pass
- [ ] Ran `make lint` — passes
- [ ] New tests added (if feature)
- [ ] Coverage maintained or improved

## Documentation
- [ ] Updated README if API changed
- [ ] Updated ARCHITECTURE if design changed
- [ ] Updated API.md if protocol changed

## Checklist
- [ ] Code follows style guide (`make format`)
- [ ] Self-review done
- [ ] Comments added for complex logic
- [ ] Tests updated/added
- [ ] Docs updated

## Notes
Any additional context or notes.
